originalTitle: Mom Friend (Ft. Amanda Hufford & Lizzie Freeman)【THE AMAZING DIGITAL CIRCUS FAN MUSIC VIDEO】
content: Stream/Pre-Save Song: https://ffm.to/kittensneezemomfriend BUY NEW MERCH: https://kittensneeze-merch.store/ How are yall feelin after Ep 9?? Yall hanging in there?? I know I barely am, but what better way to send off a show as impactful and incredible as The Amazing Digital Circus than with a new song and music video? As always-- THIS IS A NON-CANON MUSIC VIDEO & SONG! IT IS IN NO WAY SHAPE OR FORM AFFILIATED WITH GLITCH! I want to thank Amanda and Lizzie for singing on this track, we actually recorded it probablyyyy 5 or so months ago, but we spent a lot of time on the video behind the scenes for you guys! They did an incredible job and I am always so honored to work with them to bring my creations to life. Please go give them tons of love and support and watch the movie in theaters if you can! This will probably be my last big TADC song (we shall see what the future holds) and I'm really thankful for the amazing team who helped make it happen. It is always the biggest honor working with the talent that I work with and I want to continue to uplift them in any and every way! Thank you to this community and for all of you guys for supporting what we do. We couldn't make it happen without y'all. Lyrics: Just another day In the circus Just another day Feelin kinda worthless Taking care of them Is my purpose But there's something wrong Underneath the surface A few kind words is all I wanna say They never listen to me anyway They never notice just how far I bend I'm at my wit's end I'm spent But I'm the mom friend I'm the one you call when Someone takes a fall and I'm there to ask you if you're okay Cause I'm the mom friend I will care for all them Though the order's tall well I know someone will thank me someday Just another day with my memories Just another time no one would defend me Sometimes I can still hear her screaming And the 100 million ways she'd critique me Go dry your eyes and try to sit up straight No one will want you if you act that way Don't be a burden, go make yourself useful And this is crucial - smile Cause I'm the mom friend I'm the one you call when Someone takes a fall and I'm there to ask you if you're okay Cause I'm the mom friend I will care for all them Though the order's tall well I know someone will thank me someday Ragatha! Huh? Where have you been? We missed you on that last adventure again I'm in here, and I'm doing okay I'm sure that I would've just got in the way But what do you mean? You're part of the team No I can see That you don't need me You know that’s not true! I don’t deserve you Now please go away Not until I say That you're the mom friend You're the one we call when Someone takes a fall and You're there to ask us if we're okay Cause you're a true friend I rely on you when Deciding what to do then I think it's time I thanked you today Cause I'm the mom friend I'm the one you call when Someone takes a fall and I'm there to ask you if you're okay Cause I'm the mom friend I will care for all them Though the order's tall well I know someone will thank me someday They'll thank me someday I hope they'll thank me someday I hope they'll ask if I'm okay ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Please hit the subscribe button and follows me on my other socials! ★ MERCH STORE: https://kittensneeze-osr-shop.fourthwall.com/ ★ PATREON: https://www.patreon.com/c/KittenSneezeProductions ★ KO-FI: https://ko-fi.com/kittensneeze ★ BLUSKY: https://bsky.app/profile/kittensneeze.bsky.social ★ INSTAGRAM: https://www.instagram.com/kittensneeze/ ★ TIKTOK: https://www.tiktok.com/@kittensneeze ★ BUSINESS CONTACT: kittensneezebusiness@gmail.com ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- #tadc #theamazingdigitalcircus #ragatha #pomni #nerdcore #animation

chineseSummary: 小猫打喷嚏 · 108,902 次观看
chineseContent: 流媒体/预保存歌曲：https://ffm.to/kittensneezomomfriend 购买新商品：https://kittensneeze-merch.store/ 第 9 集之后你们感觉如何？你还挂在那里吗？我知道我几乎没有，但是还有什么比用一首新歌和音乐视频更好的方式来结束像《神奇数字马戏团》这样有影响力和令人难以置信的演出呢？一如既往——这是一个非经典音乐视频和歌曲！它的形状或形式与故障无关！我要感谢 Amanda 和 Lizzie 在这首歌中演唱，我们实际上可能是 5 个月前录制的，但我们在幕后为你们花了很多时间在视频上！他们做了令人难以置信的工作，我总是很荣幸与他们合作，将我的创作变为现实。如果可以的话，请给他们大量的爱和支持，并去电影院观看电影！这可能是我最后一首 TADC 歌曲（我们将看看未来会发生什么），我真的很感谢帮助实现这一切的出色团队。与我一起工作的人才一起工作始终是最大的荣幸，我希望继续以任何方式提升他们！感谢这个社区以及所有人对我们工作的支持。没有你们，我们就无法实现这一目标。歌词： 又是在马戏团的一天 又是一天 感觉自己毫无价值 照顾他们是我的目的 但在表面之下有些不对劲 我想说的只是几句善意的话 他们从来不听我的 他们从来没有注意到我弯了多远 我已经无计可施了 但我是妈妈朋友 我是你在有人跌倒时打电话的人 我在那里问你是否还好 因为我是妈妈朋友 我会的照顾他们所有人 虽然订单很高 我知道有一天有人会感谢我 只是又一天与我的记忆 只是另一个时间没有人会
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 YouTube 热门视频信号，适合用于观察大众注意力、内容叙事、传播主题和跨平台选题机会。
